# @circle-fin/provider-stablecoin-service-swap

## 1.1.5

### Patch Changes

- Internal dependency updates. No user-facing changes.

## 1.1.4

### Patch Changes

- Internal dependency updates. No user-facing changes.

## 1.1.3

### Patch Changes

- Internal dependency updates. No user-facing changes.

## 1.1.2

### Patch Changes

- Internal dependency updates. No user-facing changes.

## 1.1.1

### Patch Changes

- You can now reference cirBTC by its symbol when looking up tokens on Arc Testnet (e.g. when resolving swap inputs/outputs).

## 1.1.0

### Minor Changes

- Add Arc Testnet support for swap operations.

### Patch Changes

- Improved swap status retrieval reliability and reduced client-side polling latency.
- Update HyperEVM mainnet explorer URL to resolve location-restricted access issues
- Improved search discoverability

## 1.0.3

### Patch Changes

- Add support for Solana as a forwarder destination

## 1.0.2

### Patch Changes

- Updated chain registry metadata

## 1.0.1

### Patch Changes

- Internal dependency updates. No user-facing changes.

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

- Provider packages for connecting SwapKit and BridgeKit to Circle's backend services. Required by `@circle-fin/swap-kit` and `@circle-fin/app-kit`.
